title: Saudi crude exports inch upwards, but market remains tight
section_path: Saudi crude exports inch upwards, but market remains tight
section_path_text: Saudi crude exports inch upwards, but market remains tight
summary:
We review the latest trends in OPEC+ crude exports and arrivals in consumer markets, with a particular focus on Saudi barrels, including those inbetween at sea. By David Wech
Oil futures rallied by more than $20/b from late June to mid-September. The crucial change in the market over that time span were intensified and prolonged voluntary crude supply/export cuts by Saudi Arabia and Russia, respectively.
